title: Chapter 27
content:
Chapter 27

Once I was done cleaning Rayla, I purchased a blanket from the shop that'd keep her warm throughout the night. I kind of didn't want to dress her up, so I just purchased the warm blanket and wrapped her in it.

I left the parents' room and went to my own. I could hear Lucas sleeping in the corner on his own mattress. I made my way to my own and opened the plethora of system notifications that had appeared when I came inside Rayla.

[An achievement has been obtained]

[First timer]

[Description: A new world, a new body, yet the priorities of the user have never changed even once

The same old user who remains consistent in his goals

For such consistency, the system believes a reward is in order]

[Effect: All stats +20]

It was the same old achievement I'd obtain every time I had sex for the first time in any world. Of course, when I was in the world of spirits, it was a little different, but the same reward was granted.

Anyway, I moved to the next set of notifications.

[You have been noticed by Almira, the goddess of fertility]

[You have been granted a set of effects]

[Every woman you cum inside would have an eighty percent increased chance of getting pregnant]

[Semen level +10]

[Stamina +10]

[You won't get tired after sex anymore]

[State of completion has been increased by a maximum of ten minutes]

[Mana requirements remain unaffected]

'What the...'

The reason for my surprise was simple. I had never received the same type of notifications before, so I could only assume it was a unique effect for this world only. The effect was amazing, to say the least, and my stats were looking amazing as well. The only problem at hand was to increase my level.

Whoever this goddess of fertility was, she sure had my salute. One day, I'd repay this favor by all means that I could.

Another thing I noticed was that the state of completion's time could be extended by some means. What were they? I didn't know. But considering they were granted by a god, it probably had something to do with divine energy. I would have to check to be sure, so it was just a hypothesis for now.

Divine energy was present in every world because it was the law of the world. For some, it would change the attribute of their natural power, such as Ki to holy Ki or mana to holy mana.

Some, however, could wield divine energy as it was. But a different container had to be created in the heart for that. When it came to Ki, it wasn't that difficult because Ki was stored in the abdomen, not the heart, so there was little risk involved.

But when mana was involved, then it was a little too difficult. Both of the powers had to be stored in the same container, the heart, so the risk increment was giant as well.

Other than an achievement and the mention of obtaining a goddess's sponsorship, there was another familiar set of notifications.

[You have ejaculated inside of Rayla]

[Would you like her to become pregnant?]

[Yes\No]

A notification that appeared every time I'd cum inside of a woman if I didn't have any contraceptive skill already activated. I never wanted to be a father in my first life, but living a lonely life of debauchery was a bit depressing. Not to mention, with my aging factor involved, the effect of losing people was worse for me.

My aging speed compared to others was 1:100. While others aged a hundred years, I only aged one year. It wasn't that my body didn't age normally, but beyond a certain point, it'd be as if I would be stuck in time, not aging a bit for hundreds of years.

I could feel my life force decreasing still, but it'd be so slow that even sea turtles could live their entire lifespans by the time I lost one year's worth of life force.

So I decided to have children and watch them grow. I then watched them become parents. Then grow old. Then die. Then their children grow old, become parents, and then die, and then on and on until I was the only one left in the world while everyone else was gone.

But I didn't regret having them. They were the bundles of sunshine I so desperately craved in a dog-eat-dog world. So if I could have kids, I wouldn't deny having them.

However, considering the world where I was right now, a world that had an unconventional method of making babies, if a child were to be born naturally, then it'd be considered a monstrosity, and I wasn't strong enough to protect it yet.

'No.' I sighed and replied. No matter how much I wished for them, premature parenthood was still a rash choice. I needed to settle down first and make sure there was no one who could stand in my way, or at least I could hide the pregnancies of Rayla and others.

To be honest, a pregnant Rayla did turn me on a lot, but I shook the images out of my head. I decided to focus on what mattered at the moment and get through it. The rest came later.

My initial goal was to level up and obtain a class, but considering that I couldn't go on a hunt tomorrow, leveling up was out of the question. I couldn't even go to the sewers because it was useless. The people I killed today were not awakened, so I didn't gain any levels from them as well.

I could only sigh and leave it for tomorrow. I still had tomorrow to think things through before I'd have to attend the town's awakening ceremony.

I closed my eyes and entered the realm of sleep to worry about the rest later.

As I woke up at dawn the next day, I left the house for a jog. There was once again a massive change in the body, so I had to get used to it again.

I met a few guards on the way, but they were polite enough to greet me well and wished me luck for tomorrow's awakening ceremony. Some of them mentioned my father, which once again cemented my assumption that Julian had a past with the militia or something.

As I returned home, I saw Julian and the siblings getting ready to leave for the hunt. I mentioned joining them, but Julian strictly denied, saying I needed to rest today.

I nodded and didn't argue. Once they were gone, I went to Rayla, who was cleaning the kitchen. As she saw me enter, she smiled and said, "Why don't you wait in the living room, sweetie? I'll get you something to eat soon."

I nodded and was about to leave when I saw Rayla rubbing her legs together. Fully aware of what it was, I still had to ask for personal satisfaction.

"Why are you doing that, Mother?" I asked as I raised her skirt to see her creamy and thick thighs rubbing against each other. What she was truly rubbing was her pussy though. All things considered, she did have her first time yesterday, and it sounded amazing, no matter how one heard it.

"Oh, sweetie. It's just that my vagina is itching since I woke up this morning." She replied.

"Is it because of my massage?" I asked as my hand snaked inside of her thighs, and reached for her her slit that felt swollen even from the outside.

"No, sweetie." She immediately replied with an honest smile, "Your massage last night was out of this world."

She then rubbed her legs again, pressing them on my hand which felt amazing as I traced her pussy slit lightly, "It itches down there for some reason. Maybe I should have a physician look at it. I really hope it is not a disease or something serious."

Plagues were pretty common in this timeline, so her fears were valid. A type of reaction she had never felt before and couldn't even explain properly was enough to warrant suspicions of a foreign factor.

I chuckled and said, "Mother, how about I massage you and then see if it helps or not? You can visit a physician if it doesn't help."

Rayla looked at me, a conflicted and worried expression on her face, but she nodded nonetheless. "You're right, sweetie. I shouldn't assume the worst. Besides, physicians are expensive as well."

I nodded and asked her to part her legs, which she did. I knelt down behind her, her watermelon scent wafting to my nostrils, stimulating my desire to fuck her once more.

State of completion renewed at midnight every night, so I could use it again even when the cool down was twenty-four hours. But maybe a little break was in order for her; otherwise, I risked her getting even more uncomfortable over this.

I didn't want that.

I placed my hand on her back to lower her back a bit to the forward until she was in a perfect standing doggy position, her red swollen pussy slit and her anus in my full view.

I gulped and couldn't help but be mesmerized by the sight. I could still remember the sensations of her pussy.

Suppressing my desire, I sighed and took a deep breath before exhaling a blow on her swollen pussy.

"Angh!"
